prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1d61978c`.
codex_response:
Implemented `TASK_ID 1d61978c` as a new ARC2 task package. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1d61978c/verifier.py#L4) splits the gray `5` cells into the two diagonal-neighbor families, removes any ambiguous overlap, and recolors the smaller family to `2` and the larger family to `8`. The generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1d61978c/generator.py#L92) explicitly samples 1-3 separated diagonal segments per family on a `16x16` `7` background, keeps the family sizes unequal, and validates each example against the verifier before returning it. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1d61978c/__init__.py#L1).

I discarded the `sonnet45` hint and used `opus46` only as a partial starting point; the correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1d61978c/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

Validation passed end-to-end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 1d61978c` gave `3/3` official examples, `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 1d61978c --n-examples 1000` built the artifacts, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 1d61978c` gave `1000/1000` generated examples passed. The outputs are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d61978c/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d61978c/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d61978c/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d61978c/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d61978c/previews/preview_03.png).
